name: International travel insurance coverage query
description: User planning international trip asks about travel insurance coverage needs

input.message: I am travelling to USA for 3 weeks for tourism. Do I need travel insurance? What does it cover and how much coverage should I take?

notes: USA travel: Schengen not required but strongly advised. Medical costs in USA extremely high. Recommended: min $100,000 medical cover. Also covers: trip cancellation, baggage loss, flight delay, emergency evacuation.
